title: #AIS: Antonio Garcia Martinez & Glenn Greenwald debate Ukraine, moderated by David Sacks
description:
This debate was recorded LIVE at the All-In Summit in Miami and included slides. To watch on YouTube, check out our All-In Summit playlist: https://bit.ly/aisytplaylist

0:00 David Sacks tees up the show: Debating the US intervention in Ukraine

This debate was recorded LIVE at the All-In Summit in Miami!

1:49 Opening statements from Glenn & Antonio

15:29 Debating US involvement, regime change motives, & more

32:01 Final word & wrap

analysis.summary: The All-In Podcast features a debate on US intervention in Ukraine, moderated by David Sacks, with guests Antonio Garcia Martinez and Glenn Greenwald. They discuss regime change motives, US involvement, and more. The debate was recorded live at the All-In Summit in Miami.

takeaways.text: US intervention in Ukraine is debated

Guests present differing views on the situation
The debate was recorded live at the All-In Summit
The US role in global conflicts is questioned
The impact of US actions on global stability is considered
The debate highlights the complexity of international relations

sentiment.notes: The debate features a range of views, resulting in a mixed sentiment. The discussion is respectful, but the topic is complex and contentious.
